Mirrors  >  Home  >  MPE Home  >  Th. List  >  sgnrn Structured version   Visualization version   GIF version
Theorem sgnrn 15113
Description: The range of the signum function. (Contributed by AV, 16-Jun-2026.) (Proof shortened by TA, 21-Jun-2026.)
Assertion
Ref Expression
sgnrn ⊢ ran sgn = {-1, 0, 1}
Proof of Theorem sgnrn
StepHypRef Expression
1 df-sgn 15102 . . . . 5 ⊢ sgn = (𝑥 ∈ ℝ* ↦ if(𝑥 = 0, 0, if(𝑥 < 0, -1, 1)))
21fnmpt 6663 . . . 4 ⊢ (∀𝑥 ∈ ℝ* if(𝑥 = 0, 0, if(𝑥 < 0, -1, 1)) ∈ {-1, 0, 1} → sgn Fn ℝ*)
3 sgnval 15103 . . . . 5 ⊢ (𝑥 ∈ ℝ* → (sgn‘𝑥) = if(𝑥 = 0, 0, if(𝑥 < 0, -1, 1)))
4 sgncl 15112 . . . . 5 ⊢ (𝑥 ∈ ℝ* → (sgn‘𝑥) ∈ {-1, 0, 1})
53, 4eqeltrrd 2865 . . . 4 ⊢ (𝑥 ∈ ℝ* → if(𝑥 = 0, 0, if(𝑥 < 0, -1, 1)) ∈ {-1, 0, 1})
62, 5mprg 3084 . . 3 ⊢ sgn Fn ℝ*
74rgen 3080 . . 3 ⊢ ∀𝑥 ∈ ℝ* (sgn‘𝑥) ∈ {-1, 0, 1}
8 fnfvrnss 7104 . . 3 ⊢ ((sgn Fn ℝ* ∧ ∀𝑥 ∈ ℝ* (sgn‘𝑥) ∈ {-1, 0, 1}) → ran sgn ⊆ {-1, 0, 1})
96, 7, 8mp2an 702 . 2 ⊢ ran sgn ⊆ {-1, 0, 1}
10 sgnmnf 15110 . . . 4 ⊢ (sgn‘-∞) = -1
11 mnfxr 11241 . . . . 5 ⊢ -∞ ∈ ℝ*
12 fnfvelrn 7063 . . . . 5 ⊢ ((sgn Fn ℝ* ∧ -∞ ∈ ℝ*) → (sgn‘-∞) ∈ ran sgn)
136, 11, 12mp2an 702 . . . 4 ⊢ (sgn‘-∞) ∈ ran sgn
1410, 13eqeltrri 2861 . . 3 ⊢ -1 ∈ ran sgn
15 sgn0 15104 . . . 4 ⊢ (sgn‘0) = 0
16 0xr 11231 . . . . 5 ⊢ 0 ∈ ℝ*
17 fnfvelrn 7063 . . . . 5 ⊢ ((sgn Fn ℝ* ∧ 0 ∈ ℝ*) → (sgn‘0) ∈ ran sgn)
186, 16, 17mp2an 702 . . . 4 ⊢ (sgn‘0) ∈ ran sgn
1915, 18eqeltrri 2861 . . 3 ⊢ 0 ∈ ran sgn
20 sgn1 15107 . . . 4 ⊢ (sgn‘1) = 1
21 1xr 11243 . . . . 5 ⊢ 1 ∈ ℝ*
22 fnfvelrn 7063 . . . . 5 ⊢ ((sgn Fn ℝ* ∧ 1 ∈ ℝ*) → (sgn‘1) ∈ ran sgn)
236, 21, 22mp2an 702 . . . 4 ⊢ (sgn‘1) ∈ ran sgn
2420, 23eqeltrri 2861 . . 3 ⊢ 1 ∈ ran sgn
25 tpssi 4798 . . 3 ⊢ ((-1 ∈ ran sgn ∧ 0 ∈ ran sgn ∧ 1 ∈ ran sgn) → {-1, 0, 1} ⊆ ran sgn)
2614, 19, 24, 25mp3an 1484 . 2 ⊢ {-1, 0, 1} ⊆ ran sgn
279, 26eqssi 3954 1 ⊢ ran sgn = {-1, 0, 1}
Colors of variables: wff setvar class
Syntax hints:   = wceq 1562   ∈ wcel 2144  ∀wral 3078   ⊆ wss 3906  ifcif 4482  {ctp 4588   class class class wbr 5102  ran crn 5650   Fn wfn 6518  ‘cfv 6523  0cc0 11075  1c1 11076  -∞cmnf 11216  ℝ*cxr 11217   < clt 11218  -cneg 11417  sgncsgn 15101
